name: jhr-content-improve
description: Standalone Lambda for article improvement — bypasses Amplify 30s limit

scripts.package: tsc && cd dist && cp ../package.json . && cp ../package-lock.json . 2>/dev/null; npm ci --omit=dev && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd ..
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name jhr-content-improve --zip-file fileb://function.zip --region us-east-1
